question: Did Teri Hatcher last twice as many episodes on Desperate Housewives as her Superman show?
context: Actress Teri Hatcher completed a total of 180 episodes of Desperate Housewives.
Teri Hatcher starred in Lois & Clark: The New Adventures of Superman based on the Superman comic.
Teri Hatcher was in 87 episodes of Lois & Clark: The New Adventures of Superman.
response:
<reasoning>
Teri Hatcher completed 180 episodes of Desperate Housewives.
Teri Hatcher starred in 87 episodes of Lois & Clark: The New Adventures of Superman.
87 episodes multiplied by 2 equals 174 episodes.
180 episodes is greater than 174 episodes.
Teri Hatcher lasted more than twice as many episodes on Desperate Housewives as on her Superman show.
<answer> Yes
claims: Teri Hatcher completed 180 episodes of Desperate Housewives
Teri Hatcher starred in 87 episodes of Lois & Clark: The New Adventures of Superman
Teri Hatcher lasted more than twice as many episodes on Desperate Housewives as on her Superman show
